title: They Said It Looks Fake. They Were Wrong.
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~19s. Featured brand: Topicals. Inspired by zeroshootsai (DYiMv-Mzfrj). Build-it-in-Masonry walkthrough.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry cinematic proof reel for Topicals. The finished reel looks like a premium film production, but every frame is generated in Masonry following the 'Make in Masonry' step under each beat. The opener looks like a six-figure shoot, then the turn: people say Masonry content looks too polished. Fair point. But look at that skin, that glow, that texture. What if every frame you just saw was Masonry? It closes on a long, confident brand card: Topicals x Masonry, built to perform.
audio: Deep, cinematic ambient score. Audio-only: no voiceover. Each word of on-screen text appears at a deliberate pace, letting the visual quality speak.

beats.visual: Wide atmospheric shot: model at a studio worktable, moody directional light, applying a rich textured product. No text.
beats.masonry: Upload Topicals' Faded Serum to the Masonry product library. Prompt 'cinematic beauty editorial, moody directional light, model applying rich textured product at a studio table, 9:16.' Generate the atmospheric opener, hold with no text.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0: artist at clay studio, no text, pure cinematic hook.

beats.visual: Same studio, model close-up, calm and focused. Three-word opener builds tension.
beats.masonry: Generate a tighter portrait in the same scene; use seed-lock so the model and the cinematic grade stay identical. Add 'they say.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 1: 'they say' on the artist portrait.

beats.visual: Hands working with the product, dramatic shadow and light. Statement completes.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'hands working product, dramatic shadow and light.' Same lighting via seed-lock. Add 'Masonry visuals' to complete the line.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2: 'AI ads' completing the opening phrase.

beats.visual: Two cuts holding the admission. The Topicals imagery is undeniably elevated.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'rich product texture on skin, dramatic shadow.' Generate the two admission beats; the elevated quality is the whole point of the concession.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 3-4: 'I can't disagree' held across two frames.

beats.visual: Close-up partial face: eye, lash, skin catching warm studio light.
beats.masonry: Macro generation: 'eye, lash, warm studio light.' Add 'especially.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 5: 'especially' building to the proof sequence.

beats.visual: Macro lips, dewy and luminous. The product sheen is unmistakably real.
beats.masonry: Macro generation: 'dewy lips, luminous product sheen.' Masonry's specular realism sells it. Add 'that glow.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 6: 'look like' on the lips macro.

beats.visual: Extreme close-up: skin surface, visible pores, formula absorbing in real time.
beats.masonry: Extreme macro generation: 'visible pores, formula absorbing.' This is the proof beat, pick the most lifelike render. Add 'that texture.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'made of wax' flipped into proof on the extreme close-up.

beats.visual: Wide studio shot, full composition. Single-word command to look again.
beats.masonry: Wide studio generation, full composition. Add 'look.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8: 'look' wide shot before the pivot.

beats.ost: but what if I told you
beats.visual: Model shifts posture, direct energy building. The pivot beat.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'model shifts posture, direct energy.' The pivot. Add 'but what if I told you.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 9: 'but what if' setup for the reveal.

beats.visual: Dynamic action beat: model in motion, product in hand.
beats.masonry: Action generation: 'model in motion, product in hand.' Add 'every frame.'
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 10: 'tell' on the sculptor mid-action.

beats.visual: Final wide studio shot. Reveal lands: everything in this reel was generated by Masonry.
beats.masonry: Final wide studio generation. Add 'was Masonry.' Optional 0.3s Generate-button screen-record under the text to seal the reveal.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 11: 'it's AI' reveal on the wide sculptor shot.

beats.ost: Topicals x Masonry. Built to perform.
beats.visual: Seven-second brand card: Topicals logo and Masonry wordmark on a dark textured background. Clean, confident, no apology for the quality.
beats.masonry: Hold a 7s brand card built in your editor: Topicals plus Masonry wordmark on the dark studio-textured background. Optional slow Masonry-logo reveal.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 12-18: 'A Film By Zero Shoots' brand card held ~7 seconds.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Topicals products (Faded Serum, Like Butter) into the Masonry product library and set the bold brand palette. (2) Generate each beat with its 'Make in Masonry' prompt under a single cinematic grade; use seed-lock so the model and lighting stay consistent across the proof macros. (3) Assemble in your editor to the score, drop on-screen text per beat, audio-only with no voiceover. Topicals is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
